title: St.Philomena's Forane Church, Koonammavu
tagline: St.Philomena's Forane Church, Koonammavu — spiritual town of Kerala

overview.short: St.Philomena's Forane Church, Koonammavu is a much-loved spiritual town in Kerala, known for temples and pilgrimage.
overview.description: St. Philomena's Forane Church, popularly known as Koonammavu Church is situated in Koonammavu, a northern suburban town of Kochi City of Kerala state, India. This is one of the oldest Roman Catholic churches in India, built in 1837 AD. Even though the church is dedicated to the Virgin Philomena, Saint Chavara Achan's feast is celebrated in every year as the annual festival, a nine-day festival lasting from 26 December to 3 January along with Holy Christmas and the New Year. The church is also popular among non-Christians as a pilgrimage centre and this seventh Forane of Roman Catholic Metropol

routes.byAir: Fly to nearest airport + road transfer

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Parayakad, Ernakulam
topPlaces.description: Parayakadu, Ernakulam is also known as Parayad or Parayakad within the Chittatukara Village Panchayat, North Paravur Paravur Taluk, Ernakulam district, Kerala, India. There is also a village known as Parayakad in Alappuzha (Alleppey) district under Kuthiathode grama panchayat and Cherthala taluk.

topPlaces.name: Valluvalli
topPlaces.description: Valluvalli is a village in Kottuvalli panchayat in Ernakulam district in the Indian state of Kerala. It is located 3 km south of Paravur town.

topPlaces.name: Varappuzha
topPlaces.description: Varappuzha, IPA: [ʋɐɾɐːpːuɻɐ], (formerly known as Verapoly) is a northern suburb of the city of Kochi. It is a census town in Paravur Taluk, Ernakulam district in the Indian state of Kerala.

topPlaces.name: Kottuvally
topPlaces.description: Kottuvally is a census town near Paravoor. It is also a village in Paravur Taluk, Ernakulam district in the Indian state of Kerala situated towards the southern part of the taluk.

topPlaces.name: Chathanad
topPlaces.description: Chathanad is a small peninsula in the heart of N.paravoor City in Kerala State, India. Chathanad is a grama panchayat in N.paravoor.

topPlaces.name: Panayikulam
topPlaces.description: Panayikulam is a small village which falls in the Alangad Grama Panchayat, Paravur Taluk, Kerala, India. It is just near to Aluva town.

topPlaces.name: Alangad
topPlaces.description: Alangad is a village located in Paravur Taluk of Ernakulam District in the Indian state of Kerala. It lies almost in the middle of North Paravur and Aluva.

topPlaces.name: Veeranpuzha
topPlaces.description: Veeranpuzha is a lake in Kochi, Kerala, India. It is the northern extension of Vembanad Lake.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit St.Philomena's Forane Church, Koonammavu?
faq.a: The best time to visit St.Philomena's Forane Church, Koonammavu is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach St.Philomena's Forane Church, Koonammavu?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Cochin International Airport, Kochi (16 km) and the nearest railway station is Ernakulam Junction (Kochi) (15 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for St.Philomena's Forane Church, Koonammavu?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of St.Philomena's Forane Church, Koonammavu at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in St.Philomena's Forane Church, Koonammavu?
faq.a: Stays in St.Philomena's Forane Church, Koonammavu start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in St.Philomena's Forane Church, Koonammavu?
faq.a: The top attractions are Parayakad, Ernakulam, Valluvalli, Varappuzha, Kottuvally, Chathanad.
